description.ko: 말라버린 강바닥, 갈라진 점토, 생명체처럼 보이는 광물 퇴적물의 복잡한 패턴을 보여주는 지구 표면의 근접 탐구입니다.
description.en: A close-up exploration of the Earth's surface, showcasing the intricate patterns of dried riverbeds, cracked clay, and mineral deposits that resemble a living organism.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution macro photography of earth texture, top-down view of intricate geological patterns, cracked dry mud mixed with vibrant copper and azure mineral veins, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic, earthy tones with metallic highlights, detailed topography.
